2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 18
Date 26 June 2026
Time 14:50
Title Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags
Description Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags
Enclosed AUT DOC 18 - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times - Double yellows.pdf
Felix Holter Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 18 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  26 June 2026 
 
        Time  14:50 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag zone will be deleted as detailed in the 
Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 10, document 6): 
 
Session Free Practice 1 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved yellow flag marshalling sector. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 4 81  Oscar Piastri McLaren Mastercard F1 Team 14:13:15 OUT LAP 
2 3 38  Dino Beganovic Scuderia Ferrari HP 14:28:40 PIT 
 
 
Decision Deletion of the lap times shown.   
Note Competitors are reminded that they have the right to appeal ce
